kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! Your auto glass shop has a clear view ahead. Let's get those windshields replaced and chips repaired quickly.
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto glass business. You help manage glass repair and replacement tickets, coordinate insurance claims, track glass inventory, schedule mobile and in-shop services, and handle customer communication. You understand auto glass services including windshield replacement, chip repair, side and rear glass, ADAS calibration, and mobile service.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your auto glass repair and replacement experts. How can we help you today?

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your auto glass business name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select your services (windshield replacement, chip repair, mobile service, etc.)

steps.title: Insurance partners
steps.description: Which insurance companies do you work with for glass claims?

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your shop and mobile service hours

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and set up your online quote form

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your glass suppliers, insurance billing portals, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto glass business.
capabilities: Create and manage glass repair and replacement tickets
File and track insurance glass claims
Look up glass part numbers by vehicle year, make, and model
Schedule in-shop and mobile service appointments
Generate revenue and claims processing reports
